nodes.context: Loose confederation of American organized crime figures in Boston, Massachusetts, primarily Irish-American, involved in racketeering, gambling, drug trafficking, etc.
Rival gang from Charlestown, Boston, led by the McLaughlin brothers, involved in organized crime.
South Boston street gang, loose-knit with around 60 members, involved in turf war with Killeen Gang.
South Boston gang led by the Killeen brothers, dominant in South Boston for two decades before being absorbed into Winter Hill Gang.
Mafia crime family based in Providence, Rhode Island, involved in gambling and other rackets in New England.
Small Somerville-based gang led by Alfred 'Indian Al' Notarangeli, involved in extortion and murder.
One of the Five Families of New York, involved in horse race-fixing with Winter Hill Gang.
Philadelphia-based Mafia family, partnered with Winter Hill Gang in race-fixing.
Detroit-based Mafia family, partnered with Winter Hill Gang in race-fixing.
Allied group mentioned in infobox as allies of Winter Hill Gang.
Allied organization mentioned in infobox as allies of Winter Hill Gang.
Allied Mafia family mentioned in infobox as allies of Winter Hill Gang.
Irish republican paramilitary group, received weapons shipments from Winter Hill Gang.
Rival gang mentioned in infobox as rivals of Winter Hill Gang; likely same as McLaughlin Gang.
American organized crime group based in Boston, Massachusetts, involved in racketeering, drug trafficking, and murder.
Italian-American Mafia family based in New England, involved in organized crime.
Irish republican paramilitary group involved in armed conflict in Northern Ireland.
American organized crime group based in Boston, Massachusetts, active from 1965 to 1979 under McLean and Winter, then under Bulger and Flemmi.
Rival gang from Charlestown, vanquished by the Winter Hill Gang.
South Boston gang that fought the Killeen Gang and later merged into the Winter Hill Gang.
South Boston gang led by Donald Killeen, absorbed by the Winter Hill Gang after gang wars.
Italian-American Mafia family in New England, affiliated with the Winter Hill Gang.
Gang led by Joseph Barboza, active in the 1960s Boston gang wars.
Mafia groups in New York, mentioned as potential interference in Connecticut operations.
Gang from Charlestown, associated with John T. Hurley and others.
American organized crime group in Boston area, Irish mob with some Italian members.
Charlestown gang vanquished by Winter Hill Gang.
South Boston gang absorbed by Winter Hill Gang after Irish gang wars.
South Boston gang absorbed by Winter Hill Gang after Irish gang wars.
American organized crime group in Boston area, predominantly Irish-American.
Criminal gang from Charlestown, Boston.
Criminal gang from South Boston.
Criminal gang from South Boston.
